member.name: T:ExchangeRate
member.summary: Denotes a conversion between Hbars and cents (USD).

member.name: M:ExchangeRate.FromProtobuf(Proto.ExchangeRate)
member.summary: Create an Exchange Rate from a protobuf.

member.name: P:ExchangeRate.ExpirationTime
member.summary: Expiration time of this exchange rate
